message:
fix: gate session kill on MQ submission success (GH#1945)

gt done was killing the polecat session unconditionally, even when push
or MR bead creation failed. This lost the polecat work because the
session died before recovery could happen.

Gate the session kill on !pushFailed && !mrFailed. When MQ submission
fails, the session is preserved so the Witness can investigate or the
polecat can retry. Sets sessionKilled=true in the preservation path to
prevent the deferred backstop from killing the session.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
